sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, and PWK source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>92642<pc>480,2<k1>dih<k2>dih<h>1<e>1
<hom>1.</hom> <s>dih</s> ¦ <ab>cl.</ab> 2. <ab>P.</ab> <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>degDi</s>, <s>digDe</s>, <ls>Dhātup. xxiv, 5</ls> (<ab>Subj.</ab> <s>-de/hat</s>, <ls>RV. vii, 50, 2</ls>; <ab>pf.</ab> <s>dideha</s>, <s>didihe</s>, <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ab>fut.</ab> <s>Dekzyati</s>, <s>degDA</s>, <ls>Siddh.</ls>; <ab>aor.</ab> <s>aDikzat</s>, <s>˚ta</s>, 3. <ab>pl.</ab> <s>˚zur</s>, <ls>JaimBr.</ls>; <s>adigDa</s>, <ls>Pāṇ. vii, 3, 73</ls>)
<div n="to"/>to anoint, smear, plaster, <ls>ŚBr.</ls>; <ls>KātyŚr.</ls>; <ls>Mn.</ls>; <ls>MBh.</ls>; <ls>R.</ls> &c.;
<div n="vp"/> increase, accumulate, <ls>L.</ls> :
<div n="vp"/><ab>Caus.</ab> <s>dehayati</s>, <s>˚te</s>, <ls>MBh.</ls> &c.;
<div n="vp"/> <ab>aor.</ab> <s>adIdihat</s>:
<div n="vp"/><ab>Desid.</ab> <s>diDikzati</s>, <s>˚te</s>;
<div n="to"/> <s>DIkzate</s> (<ls>ŚBr.</ls>), to wish to anoint one's self:
<div n="vp"/><ab>Intens.</ab> <s>dedihyate</s>, <s>dedegDi</s>. <info westergaard="diha,24.5,02.0006"/><info whitneyroots="dih,73"/><info verb="genuineroot" cp="2P,2Ā"/>
<LEND>

<L>33077<pc>3-0639<k1>dih<k2>dih
{#dih#}¦, {#degDi, digDe#}
<ls>DHĀTUP. 24,5</ls>; {#Dekzyati, degDA#} <is>Kār.</is> 6 aus
<ls>SIDDH. K.</ls> zu <ls>P. 7,2,10</ls>; {#aDikzat, aDikzata#} und {#adigDa#}
<ls>P. 7,3,73.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 8,130.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">9,46.</ls> {%bestreichen, verstreichen, verkitten, salben%}: {#vA\cA Sa\lyA~ a\Sani^BirdihA\naH#}
<ls>ṚV. 10,87,4.</ls> {#ye apI^za\nye adi^ha\nya Asya\nye a\vAsf^jan (izum)#}
<ls>AV. 4,6,7.</ls> {#adihaMScandanEH SuBrEH#}
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 17,54.</ls> {#digDa/#} {%bestrichen, besalbt, beschmiert, besudelt%}
<ls>AK. 3,2,39.</ls>
<ls>TRIK. 3,3,218.</ls>
<ls>H. 1483.</ls>
<ls>an. 2,241.</ls>
<ls>MED. dh. 7.</ls> {#mfdA digDA#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 6,7,1,15.</ls>
<ls>KĀTY. ŚR. 16,5,2.</ls>
<ls>KAUŚ. 28.</ls> {#divyacandanadigDANga#}
<ls>R. 3,42,49.</ls>
<ls>BHARTṚ. 1,48.</ls>
<ls>BHAṬṬ. 3,21.</ls> {#nadISEvAladigDANga#}
<ls>MBH. 13,2660.</ls> {#hastAvasfgdigDO#}
<ls>M. 3,132.</ls>
<ls>RAGH. 16,15.</ls> {#maladigDANgI#}
<ls>N. 24,41.</ls> {#pAMSuSoRitadigDANga#}
<ls>DAŚ. 1,34.</ls> {%mit Gift bestrichen%} (Pfeil), <ab>subst.</ab> {%ein vergifteter Pfeil%}
<ls>AK. 2,8,2,56.</ls>
<ls>TRIK.</ls>
<ls>H. 779.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls> {#izu^riva di\gDA pf^dA\kuri^va#}
<ls>AV. 5,18,15.</ls>
<ls>M. 7,90.</ls> {#digDavidDa#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 14,9,4,8.</ls> {#digDahata#}
<ls>R. GORR. 2,114,33.</ls> {#digDahasta#}
<ls>MBH. 5,1473.</ls> {#sA vidDA bahuBirvAkyErdigDEriva gajANganA#}
<ls>R. 2,30,23.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#digDa#} . — <ab>desid.</ab> {#DI/kzate#} {%sich salben wollen%}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 3,2,2,30.</ls> {#DIkzita#} <ab>ebend.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#aBi#}, <ab>partic.</ab> {#aBidigDa#} {%angekittet%} oder {%bestrichen%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%vergiftet%}: {#dantA\stapa^sA\Bidi^gDAH#}
<ls>AV. 5,18,8.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ava#} {%bestreichen, beschmieren%}: {#dantarajasAvadegDi#}
<ls>KAUŚ. 31.</ls>
[Page3-0640]
<div n="p">— {#A#}, <ab>partic.</ab> {#AdigDa#} {%bestrichen, besalbt, beschmiert%}: {#bAhuBiScandanAdigDEH#}
<ls>MBH. 7,4386.</ls> {#kavacEH SoRitAdigDEH#}
<ls n="MBH.">6,4384.</ls> <ls>HARIV. 9357.</ls> <ls>BHĀG. P. 5,5,32.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#ud#} {%aufwerfen%}: {#UrjaM vA etaM rasaM pfTivyA upadIkA uddihanti yadvalmIkam#}
<ls>TAITT. ĀR. 5,2,8.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#uddehikA#} .
<div n="p">— {#upa#}, <ab>partic.</ab> {#upadigDa#} {%beschmiert, belegt mit%}: {#SirogalaM kaPopadigDam#}
<ls>SUŚR. 2,376,11.</ls> {#lohAnAM ca maRInAM ca malapaNkopadigDatA#}
<ls>KĀM. NĪTIS. 7,24.</ls> <ab>viell.</ab> {%gefleckt%}: {#suviBaktadehA na copadigDA na kfSAH kzamASca#} (sind die <is>Bhadra</is> genannten Elephanten)
<ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 66,1.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#upadeha#} .
<div n="p">— {#ni#}
<ls>P. 8,4,17.</ls> <ab>partic.</ab> {#nidigDa#} {%klebend an%}: {#yaTADo BUmO nidigDaM tadamuyA syAdevaM tat#}
<ls>ŚAT. BR. 1,7,2,13.</ls>
<ls>SĀY.</ls> hat {#nidagDaM#} gelesen. = {#upacita#}
<ls>AK. 3,2,38</ls>; <ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> {#nis#} .
<div n="p">— {#pariRi#}, {#˚degDi#}
<ls>P. 8,4,17</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<div n="p">— {#praRi#}, {#˚degDi#}
<ls>P. 8,4,47</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab>
<ls>VOP. 8,22.</ls> <ls n="VOP.">9,46.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#nis#}, <ab>partic.</ab> {#nirdigDa = mAMsala, upacita#} {%mit Fleisch belegt, wohlgenährt%}
<ls>H. 449.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> {#ni#} .
<div n="p">— {#pari#} {%belegen, überziehen%}: {#yadvi\jAma\nparu^zi\ vanda^na\M Buva^dazWI\vantO\ pari^ ku\lPO ca\ deha^t#}
<ls>ṚV. 7,50,2.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#pra#} {%beschmieren, bestreichen, salben%}: {#SigruBirnavanItamiSrEH pradegDi#}
<ls>KAUŚ. 29.</ls> {#pradehEH pradihyAt#}
<ls>SUŚR. 1,42,19.</ls> {#pradihya#}
<ls n="SUŚR.">100,21.</ls> {#pradigDa#} {%beschmiert, bestrichen, befleckt, besalbt, überzogen mit%}
<ls n="SUŚR.">42,2. 97,18. 110,6 (230,16</ls> ist wohl {#pradagDa#} zu lesen). {#ruDira˚#}
<ls>BHAG. 2,5.</ls>
<ls>MBH. 8,3306.</ls> {#viza˚#}
<ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 77,1.</ls> {#mala˚#}
<ls>BṚH. 26 (25),16.</ls> <ls>R. 5,11,24.</ls>
<div n="p">— {#sam#} {%beschmieren, bestreichen, überziehen%}: {#lomAni jatunA saMdihya#}
<ls>KAUŚ. 13. 26.</ls> {#raktacandanasaMdigDO — bAhU#}
<ls>MBH. 8,3161.</ls> {#DUpErjAlaviniHsftErvalaBayaH saMdigDapAravatAH#}
<ls>VIKR. 43.</ls> — <ab>pass.</ab> ({%zusammengeklebt sein, verschwimmen) verwechselt werden mit%}: {#sA pfTivyA saMdihyate#}
<ls>NIR. 2,7.</ls> {#karotikiratI saMdigDO varzakarmaRA#}
<ls n="NIR. 2,">8.</ls> {#anugarjitasaMdigDAH — murajasvanAH#}
<ls>KUMĀRAS. 6,40.</ls> {#saMdigDa#} {%nicht deutlich hervortretend, unverständlich%}: {#saMdigDAkzarayA girA#}
<ls>MBH. 1,6565.</ls> {#vAzpasaMdigDayA girA#}
<ls n="MBH.">2,701.</ls> <ls n="MBH.">3,2500.</ls> <ls n="MBH. 3,">2913.</ls> <ls>R. 2,100,28.</ls> <ls n="R.">4,58,9.</ls> {#vAzpasaMdigDayA vAcA#}
<ls n="R.">5,32,2</ls>; <ab>vgl.</ab> {#asaMdigDa#} . {%in Zweifel, in Ungewissheit sein, dem Zweifel unterliegen%}: {#tasya saMdidihe budDistAM dfzwvA tadvinirRaye#}
<ls>R. 5,18,17.</ls> {#saMdihyamAnAnyavyaktAjAdipadAni#}
<ls>MADHUS.</ls> in <ls>Ind. St. 1,19,22.</ls> <ab>med.</ab> <ab>dass.</ab>: {#marizyati na veti saMdihAnAH#}
<ls>SĀY.</ls> zu <ls>ṢAḌV. BR. 4,6.</ls> {#saMdigDa#} {%verzweifelnd an%}: {#avIryA vIryasaMdigDAH#}
<ls>R. 1,66,25.</ls> {%in Zweifel, in Ungewissheit sich befindend; zweifelhaft, ungewiss%}: {#sa saMdigDamivAtmAnaM mene#}
<ls>HARIV. 3758.</ls> {#˚mati#}
<ls>YĀJÑ. 3,152.</ls> {#cetas#}
<ls>MĀLAV. 63.</ls> {#˚budDi#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 69,2.</ls> {#˚niScaya#}
<ls>R. 1,7,6.</ls> {#smfti#}
<ls n="R.">5,18,7.</ls> {#saMdigDasADyavAnpakzaH#} (<ab>Gegens.</ab> {#niScita#})
<ls>TARKAS. 39.</ls> {#saMdigDArTa#}
<ls>YĀJÑ. 2,16.</ls> {#paraloka#}
<ls>PAÑCAT. I,196.</ls> {#saMdigDo vijayo yuDi#}
<ls n="PAÑCAT.">III,11.</ls> {#˚Pala#}
(<ls>WILSON</ls> und
<ls>BENFEY</ls> {%vergiftet%})
<ls>DAŚAK. 88,1</ls> (<ls>BENF. Chr. 197,2).</ls> {#asaMdigDam#} <lex>adv.</lex> {%ohne Zweifel, bestimmt%}
<ls>PAÑCAT. 241,8.</ls>
<ls>VID. 67.</ls>
<ls>MĀRK. P. 23,66.</ls>
<div n="v">— <ab>Vgl.</ab> {#saMdeGa, saMdeha#} . — <ab>caus.</ab> {%undeutlich machen, verwirren%}: {#tanme saMdehayaddiSaH#}
<ls>MBH. 1,5183.</ls> <ab>med.</ab> {%in Zweifel, in Ungewissheit sein%}: {#aTa saMdehayAnAnAM dfzwvA spfzwvA ca pArTivam . yattadASaNkitaM pApaM tasya jajYe viniScayaH ..#}
<ls>R. 2,65,15.</ls>
<LEND>

<L>50444<pc>3-092-a<k1>dih<k2>dih<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> √{#dih#}¦, {#degDi, de/hati, ˚te, dihAna/#}; {%bestreichen, verstreichen, verkitten, salben%}. {#digDa/#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%bestrichen besalbt, beschmiert, besudelt, — mit%} (<ab>Instr.</ab> oder im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%bestrichen,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%gestreift —, berührt von%} (<ab>Instr.</ab>). <div n="p">— Mit {#anu#}, {#˚digDa#} {%überzogen —, belegt mit%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend) <ls>CARAKA. 6,18</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBi#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%umwinden%} <ls>ĀPAST. ŚR. 15,17,8</ls>. <div n="1">— 2〉 {#aBi/digDa#} {%geglättet,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%blank, scharf%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#ava#} {%bestreichen, beschmieren%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#A#}, {#AdigDa#} {%bestrichen —, besalbt —, beschmiert mit%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend). <div n="p">— Mit {#ud#} {%aufwerfen, aufschütten%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#upa#}, {#upadigDa#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%beschmiert —, belegt mit%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend). <div n="1">— 2〉 {%fett%} (Gegensatz {%mager%}) <ls>VARĀH. BṚH. S. 67,1</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#ni#}, {#ni/digDa#} {%klebend an%} (<ab>Loc.</ab>) <div n="p">— Mit *{#pariRi#} und *{#praRi#}. <div n="p">— Mit *{#nis#}, {#nirdigDa#} {%fett%} (Gegensatz mager). <div n="p">— Mit {#pari#} {%belegen, überziehen%}. <div n="p">— Mit {#pra#} {%beschmieren, bestreichen, salben%}. {#pradigDa#} {%beschmiert —, bestrichen —, besalbt —, befleckt —, überzogen mit%} (<ab>Instr.</ab> oder im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend). <div n="p">— Mit {#sam#} <div n="1">— 1〉 {%beschmieren, bestreichen, überziehen%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Med.</ab> ({#saMdigDe#} <ls>BHĀM. 2,10</ls>. {#saMdihAna#} und {#saMdehamAna#}) und <ab>Pass.</ab> {%in Zweifel-, in Ungewissheit sein, — über%} (<ab>Loc.</ab>) <ls>ĀRYAV. 57,12</ls>. {%dem Zweifel unterliegen, zweifelhaft sein%} <ls>ŚAṂK. zu BĀDAR. 4,3,15</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 <ab>Pass.</ab> {%verwechselt werden mit%} (<ab>Instr.</ab>). <div n="1">— 4〉 <ab>Partic.</ab> {#saMdi#} [Page3-092-b] {#gDa#} <div n="2">— a〉 {%beschmiert —, bestrichen —, überzogen mit%} (<ab>Instr.</ab> oder im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend). <div n="2">— b〉 {%verwechselt mit%} (<ab>Instr.</ab> oder im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend). <div n="2">— c〉 {%zweifelhaft, ungewiss, unsicher%} (Schiff <ls>GAUT.</ls>). <div n="2">— d〉 {%zweifelhaft von einer Person,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%bescholten%} <ls>JOLLY, Schuld. 306</ls>. <div n="2">— e〉 {%zweifelhaft,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%undeutlich, nicht recht verständlich%}. <div n="2">— f〉 {%in Zweifel —, in Ungewissheit sich befindend, verzweifelnd an%} (im <ab>Comp.</ab> vorangehend; der Commentar nimmt eine Verstellung der Worte, also <ab>Bed.</ab> c〉 an). <div n="m">— <ab>Caus.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {#saMdehayati#} {%für Jmd%} (<ab>Gen.</ab>) {%Etwas%} (<ab>Acc.</ab>). {%verwirren,%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%Jmd irre machen in%}. <div n="1">— 2〉 <ab>Med.</ab> {%in Zweifel —, in Ungewissheit sein%}. {#sadehamAna#} <ab>v. l.</ab> für {#saMdehayAna#}. <div n="1">— 3〉 {#saMdehita#} {%in Frage gestellt, bedroht%} <ls>DHŪRTAN. 14</ls>. <div n="p">— Mit {#aBisam#} in {#aBsaMdeha#}. <LEND>
